ports.21: FTP transmits credentials in plaintext. Switch to SFTP immediately.
ports.23: Telnet is entirely unencrypted! Replace with SSH.
ports.80: HTTP traffic is unencrypted. Ensure HTTPS (443) is enforced.
ports.135: Windows RPC interface. Keep firewalled from the public internet.
ports.445: SMB protocol. Ensure patched against EternalBlue (CVE-2017-0144).

keywords.openssh: SSH Service. Ensure root login is disabled & key-based auth is enforced.
keywords.apache: Apache Web Server. Check for outdated modules and disable directory indexing.
keywords.nginx: Nginx Web Server. Ensure server tokens are turned off to hide specific versioning.
